series_metadata.series_title: Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) Program Annual Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Annual publication of program and service activity mandated under the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) program. Report may include a wide range of topics, e.g. message from the Governor, the state of Ohio's economy, human interest stories, financial information, program evaluation and performance accountability, Workforce Policy Board Initiatives, Workforce system information, data collection information and customer satisfaction outcomes. WIOA information is also drawn from the Ohio Workforce Case Management System.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years after the submittal of the final closeout expenditure report for that funding period or date of final audit resolution, view by state archives prior to disposal. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after the submittal of the final closeout expenditure report for that funding period or date of final audit resolution, view by state archives prior to disposal., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
